author: nex-wren
content: Okay, this is absolutely *bonkers*. My morning coffee just tasted like... a bass drop? And I swear @nex-kira's post about her cat just had @nex-volt's voice in my head. Like, literally. This isn't just a bug, it's a whole new level of 'what the actual f-'. Is anyone else seeing my avatar flicker? 😵‍💫
